title: Add Xeva AI to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Xeva AI](https://xeva.tedeca.de/) to chat
- Xeva AI lets you ask for support, help, or chat with no chat storage. Chats are kept in a secure database that only the CEO and CTO can access, and data selling is forbidden.

Fixes #10483

gist.headline: Xeva AI joins the hive
gist.blurb: Xeva AI just landed in the community greenhouse! It's a secure, privacy-focused chat app where your data stays safe and sound.
gist.summary: Added Xeva AI, a privacy-focused chat application with strict data protection policies, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use Xeva AI for secure chat interactions directly from the community greenhouse.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee welcoming a new secure chat app in the greenhouse. A friendly robot holding a shield to represent privacy and secure databases.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot watering a new glowing chat-bubble plant in a digital greenhouse. A friendly chunky robot stands nearby holding a small pixelated shield, representing privacy and security. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
